## RPAA/MSB decision tree (TrustField / VIRLUX only)

Governance-only activities → neither MSB nor RPAA. Payment activities → map FINTRAC + Bank of Canada separately.

**Noetfield product** remains non-PSP per [STRATEGIC_LOCK.md](../../../STRATEGIC_LOCK.md).
